name: POS CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: windows-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup .NET
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: 8.0.x

      - name: Restore packages
        run: dotnet restore RestaurantPOS.sln

      - name: Build solution
        run: dotnet build RestaurantPOS.sln --configuration Release --no-restore
